commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a 16 MiB default cap to Google Chat media downloads when `maxBytes` is omitted and adds a regression test for that no-`maxBytes` path.

PR surface: Source -4, Tests +36. Total +32 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: on current `main`, call `downloadGoogleChatMedia` without `maxBytes` against a successful streamed media response and the no-cap branch reaches `res.arrayBuffer()`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated repair lane is appropriate: the code change appears coherent, but merge should wait for contributor real behavior proof and maintainer acceptance of the fallback cap.

target.title: fix(googlechat): media downloads can grow unbounded without a size cap
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes an issue where direct callers of the Google Chat media download API could omit `maxBytes` and let a successful media response buffer through an uncapped `arrayBuffer()` call. The normal inbound attachment path already passes a configured cap, but the exported helper still had an uncapped fallback.

## Why This Change Was Made

Google Chat media downloads now use a 16 MiB default response cap whenever callers do not provide a stricter cap. Existing callers that pass `maxBytes` keep their configured limit and error text.

## User Impact

Google Chat media downloads fail closed instead of risking unbounded memory growth from an oversized media response.

## Evidence

- Red test before the fix: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/googlechat/src/targets.test.ts -- --run` failed because the no-`maxBytes` path called `arrayBuffer()` (`unbounded arrayBuffer should not be called`).
- After fix: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/googlechat/src/targets.test.ts -- --run` -> 1 file / 25 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/googlechat/src/api.ts extensions/googlechat/src/targets.test.ts` -> clean.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/googlechat/src/api.ts extensions/googlechat/src/targets.test.ts` -> clean.

AI-assisted: built with Codex
target.author: sunlit-deng
